fact_nuggets.text: Marvel Scale (Japanese: Marvelous Scale) is an Ability introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation V, it was the signature Ability of Milotic.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts Defense if there is a status problem. MD T D S Boosts the Pokemon's Defense when it has any status problems. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD When the Pokemon gets a bad status condition, its Defense goes up! MD RT DX When the Pokemon gets a bad status condition, such as poison or paralysis, its Defense goes up.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] While the Pokemon with this Ability has a non-volatile status condition , its Defense is increased by 50%. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Marvel Scale has no effect outside of battle.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] While the Pokemon with this Ability has a non-volatile status condition , its Defense is increased by 50%.
Increases Defense to 1.5 with a major status ailment.
